description:
You are analyzing a patient's fluid responsiveness by measuring the 'swing' in arterial blood pressure caused by mechanical ventilation. Calculate the Systolic Pressure Variation (SPV) from the 'Solar8000/ART' waveform in Vital Recorder for Case #3 ('0003.vital') during the time window 00:45:00 - 00:45:15. The SPV is the difference between the maximum and minimum systolic peak pressures (Max SBP - Min SBP) within this window. Create a report at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\spv_calculation.txt' using the format:
SPV REPORT
Time Window: 00:45:00 - 00:45:15
Max SBP: [Value] mmHg
Min SBP: [Value] mmHg
Calculated SPV: [Value] mmHg
Save a screenshot of the waveform view used for the calculation to 'C:\Users\Docker\Pictures\spv_waveform.png'.
